name: The Mercy-House
descriptionSeed: Where the Orders take weight off people — genuinely, permanently, at real cost to the one who lifts it. A Seraph who grants mercy CARRIES what they lifted. The Mercy-House is full of people who have taken on other people's worst things and are still standing, and it is the strongest argument this civilization has, and it is a very good one.
encounterFlavor: Mercy-bearers who are carrying more than you can imagine; someone set down after twenty years; **Sister Alder**, if she is anywhere, is sometimes here.
questSeeds: A mercy-bearer is carrying something that is killing them and will not set it down
Someone is here to ask mercy for a thing that should not be forgiven, and their case is good
